title: Duplicating items through automations

posts.author: Rob_E3 (Rob )
posts.cookedHtml:
I have items on a board that I am trying to copy/duplicate over to a different board, based on an automation trigger.
I am using Update Magic to keep the updates, after duplicating the item, but I am then trying to send that item to another board with matching fields and every time I’m losing the image field and I can’t figure out why.

Screen Shot 2023-01-13 at 2.45.27 PM1053×265 15.4 KB

Screen Shot 2023-01-13 at 2.45.39 PM1005×597 39.5 KB

Screen Shot 2023-01-13 at 2.46.29 PM629×647 46.6 KB

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Rob_E3

It is likely that the copy item has not completed copying the item when the move starts, specifically duplicating the file(s).

If the timing of moving the copied item to the YouTube board is not critical, you could change the move in your recipe above to set a date to today. Then add a move recipe at the end of the day like:

image698×556 25.2 KB

If that won’t work, let me know. I’ll see about adding a delayed move to the Update Magic function.

Jim - The Monday Man
